title: Fusion Project Timeline Comparison
executive_question: When can we realistically expect fusion to deliver electricity to the grid?
required_metrics: Milestone type (e.g., first plasma, net energy gain, construction start, commercial operation)
comparison_set: ITER, SPARC (Commonwealth Fusion Systems), DEMO (EU), Helion Energy, TAE Technologies, General Fusion
preferred_sources: ITER Organization official timeline
Commonwealth Fusion Systems press releases
EUROfusion DEMO roadmap
Company investor presentations (Helion, TAE, General Fusion)
search_queries: ITER project timeline 2024 milestones first plasma
Commonwealth Fusion Systems SPARC timeline 2024 net energy
data_quality_rule: Only include milestones with official announcements or peer-reviewed publications; note if a milestone is speculative.

title: LCOE Projections for Fusion vs. Other Technologies
executive_question: Will fusion be cost-competitive with renewables and fossil fuels?
required_metrics: Technology (fusion, solar PV, onshore wind, nuclear fission, natural gas combined cycle)
comparison_set: Fusion (range from multiple studies), solar PV, onshore wind, nuclear fission, natural gas combined cycle
preferred_sources: BloombergNEF LCOE reports
IEA World Energy Outlook
Lazard Levelized Cost of Energy Analysis
Fusion Industry Association reports
search_queries: Lazard levelized cost of energy 2024 fusion projection
IEA World Energy Outlook 2024 fusion cost
data_quality_rule: Use only published LCOE estimates from reputable sources; clearly label projections vs. historical data.

title: Global Fusion Investment Landscape
executive_question: Who is leading the fusion race and where is the money coming from?
required_metrics: Country/region (US, EU, UK, Japan, China, other)
Investment type (public government, private venture capital, corporate R&D)
comparison_set: US, EU, UK, Japan, China, other
preferred_sources: Fusion Industry Association annual investment reports
US DOE fusion budget documents
UK Atomic Energy Authority funding announcements
Crunchbase or PitchBook for private fusion deals
search_queries: Fusion Industry Association investment report 2024 cumulative funding
private fusion investment 2024 venture capital total
data_quality_rule: Cross-check private investment figures with multiple databases; note if data is incomplete for certain regions.

title: Regulatory Readiness Index
executive_question: Which countries are best positioned to host the first commercial fusion plants?
required_metrics: Licensing clarity score (1-5 based on published guidance)
comparison_set: US, UK, Japan, Canada, France, China, South Korea, Germany, Australia, Switzerland
preferred_sources: US Nuclear Regulatory Commission fusion rulemaking documents
UK Department for Business, Energy & Industrial Strategy fusion regulation
Japan's QST regulatory framework
IAEA fusion safety standards
Pew Research or Ipsos public opinion surveys on nuclear energy
search_queries: US NRC fusion regulatory framework 2024 licensing
data_quality_rule: Score regulatory clarity based on published official documents only; note if a country has no specific fusion regulation.

title: Tritium Supply-Demand Gap
executive_question: Is tritium availability a showstopper for fusion deployment?
required_metrics: Tritium demand (kg/year) from planned fusion reactors
Tritium supply (kg/year) from CANDU reactors and other sources
preferred_sources: IAEA tritium supply reports
Canadian Nuclear Laboratories CANDU tritium production data
Fusion Industry Association tritium working group
Journal of Fusion Energy articles on tritium breeding
search_queries: tritium breeding ratio fusion reactor requirements
data_quality_rule: Use only official or peer-reviewed tritium production and demand estimates; clearly state assumptions about reactor tritium consumption.
